title: Creo: Fundamentals of Solid Modeling 1
description: Core 3D modeling fundamentals including the Creo design process, parametric modeling concepts, the Creo Parametric user interface, feature editing, sketching, datums, and extrude features.

modules.title: Modeling Parts Framework & Parametric Concepts
modules.description: Examine the Creo design process, the model creation process, parametric modeling concepts, and Creo file types with design associativity.

modules.title: Creo Parametric User Interface
modules.description: Explore the Creo Parametric interface, file management, the Model Tree, and feature visibility controls including hide and suppress.

modules.title: Feature Editing Basics
modules.description: Learn selection and mouse controls, drag handles, feature editing techniques, datum display, and view controls.

modules.title: Sketching, Datums & Extrude Features
modules.description: Master datum features, sketch creation, sketch geometry, feature-based modeling, parent-child relationships, dimensions, constraints, and extrude feature options.
